conditions.concept_name: Renal cell carcinoma, clear cell type

study.description: Baseline CT abdomen pelvis with contrast
Chest CT confirming no pulmonary metastases

outcome_trajectory.clinician_factors: Complete response to nivolumab+cabozantinib after cytoreductive nephrectomy. PBRM1 loss associated with favorable immunotherapy response. All measurable disease resolved by 8 months.
outcome_trajectory.hindsight_note: Nivo+cabo was optimal for VHL+PBRM1 profile. PBRM1 loss is a positive biomarker for IO response in ccRCC. Surgical debulking before systemic therapy contributed to CR.

conditions.concept_name: Renal cell carcinoma, clear cell type

outcome_trajectory.clinician_factors: Partial response to pembrolizumab+axitinib. Lung nodules shrinking well. Primary mass responding slowly. BAP1 loss is prognostic negative but treatment still effective. Thyroid dysfunction (IO-related) managed with monitoring.
outcome_trajectory.hindsight_note: Pembro+axi reasonable for VHL+BAP1 profile. BAP1 loss associated with aggressive biology but IO combo still producing PR. Monitor thyroid closely.

conditions.concept_name: Renal cell carcinoma, clear cell type

study.description: Baseline CT abdomen pelvis with contrast
Spine MRI for bone metastasis evaluation

outcome_trajectory.clinician_factors: Stable disease on sunitinib. Minimal tumor shrinkage. SETD2 loss associated with sunitinib resistance in literature. Bone metastasis stable but concerning. Fatigue and hand-foot syndrome affecting QoL. May need to switch to IO-based therapy.
outcome_trajectory.hindsight_note: Sunitinib monotherapy suboptimal for VHL+SETD2 profile. Should have started with IO+TKI combo. SETD2 loss predicts poor VEGF-TKI response. Consider switch to nivo+cabo.

conditions.concept_name: Renal cell carcinoma, clear cell type

study.description: CT on everolimus showing continued PD

outcome_trajectory.clinician_factors: Progressive disease through both sunitinib and everolimus. Liver metastases growing rapidly. PBRM1 loss should have predicted IO benefit - should have used IO-based first line. TP53+CDKN2A+PTEN triple hit indicates aggressive biology.
outcome_trajectory.hindsight_note: PBRM1 loss predicted good IO response but was treated with sequential TKI/mTOR instead. Should have started with nivo+cabo or pembro+axi. Two lines wasted.

outcome_trajectory.clinician_factors: Partial response to cabozantinib monotherapy. MET amplification is the primary driver and cabo targets MET directly. 44% primary tumor reduction. Lung nodules responding well. Papillary RCC with MET-driven biology.
outcome_trajectory.hindsight_note: Cabozantinib monotherapy was the right choice for MET-amplified papillary RCC. MET is the primary oncogenic driver. Good targeted response validates molecular profiling.
